info.title: SaaS Maker API
info.description: API for SaaS Maker — feedback, analytics, forms, roadmap, and more.

questions.description: Optional inline questions to create with the form

post.description: Ingests a page view or custom event. Country, device, browser, and OS are auto-detected from headers/UA.

get.description: Returns summary stats, timeseries, top pages, referrers, countries, devices, browsers, OS, events, and bots. Accepts either API key or session auth.

get.summary: Get detailed analytics for a section

post.description: Submit a bug report, feature request, or general feedback for a project.

get.description: List feedback items for the authenticated project (via API key). Supports filtering and sorting.

get.summary: Feature request board across all projects

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status, or 'all' for no filter

get.summary: Public feedback list by project slug
get.description: No auth required. Optionally pass Bearer token to include viewer_vote.

200.description: Paginated feedback list with project info

get.summary: Get published form by slug (API key)
Get published form by slug (no auth)
get.description: For hosted survey pages. No authentication required.

post.summary: Submit form response by slug (no auth)
post.description: For hosted survey pages. No authentication required.
Create a new form with optional inline questions.

200.description: Form with questions and response count

get.summary: Get public roadmap by project slug
get.description: No auth required. Returns only public roadmap items.

200.description: Public roadmap items with project info

post.description: No auth required. Uses user_identifier for deduplication.
Creates a roadmap item from a feedback item and marks the feedback as on_roadmap.
Update positions and columns for multiple items after drag-and-drop.
